Step.label: REST: Check sCallingPartyNumber
Step.notes:
https://guardmodule-api.n-allo.dvp
c_sURLGuardAPI & "/api/Guards/AnyGuardWithPhoneNumberAndConfig/" & GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "ConfigId", 0)) & // & sCallingPartyNumber & // & "0"

Parameter.label: Ignore Invalid SSL Certificate Date (expired certificate)
Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Failure; URL=" & sURL

Step.label: StrEqlNoCase(sResponseBody, "true")
Step.notes: iIndexArray <= iCountArray

Step.label: REST: Check sCallingPartyNumber
Step.notes:
https://guardmodule-api.n-allo.dvp
c_sURLGuardAPI & "/api/Guards/GetGuardByPhoneNumberAndConfig/" & sCallingPartyNumber & "/" & GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "ConfigId", 0))

Parameter.label: Ignore Invalid SSL Certificate Date (expired certificate)
Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Failure; URL=" & sURL

Step.label: Not allowed
Step.notes: "You are not allowed to use this service, if you disagree, contact your administrator. Thank you for calling. Bye"

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "You are not allowed to use this service, if you disagree, contact your administrator. Thank you for calling. Bye"

Step.label: Currently NOT Activated
Step.notes: "Your mobile number is currently Not Activated for: " & sConfigName & "."

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "Your mobile number is currently Not Activated for: " & sConfigName & "."

Step.label: Active?
Step.notes: StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(lsValuesList1, Find(lsNamesList1, "active", 0)), "1")

Step.label: Currently Activated
Step.notes: "Your mobile number is currently Activated for: " & sConfigName & "."

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "Your mobile number is currently Activated for: " & sConfigName & "."

Step.label: Get sConfigName
Step.notes: GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "ConfigName", 0)

Parameter.label: Suppress logging of the input digits.

Step.label: "Activate?"
Step.notes: "To activate this number, Press 7.

Step.label: "Deactivate?"
Step.notes: "To deactivate this number, Press 3."

Parameter.label: Suppress logging of the input digits.

Step.label: StrEqlNoCase(sResponseBody, "true")
Step.notes: iIndexArray <= iCountArray

Step.label: REST: Deactivate Guard
Step.notes:
https://guardmodule-api.n-allo.dvp
c_sURLGuardAPI & "/api/Guards/Disable/" & GetAt(lsValuesList1, Find(lsNamesList1, "id", 0))
c_sURLGuardAPI & "/api/Guards/AnyGuardWithPhoneNumberAndConfig/" & GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "ConfigId", 0)) & "/" & sCallingPartyNumber & "/" & "0"

Parameter.label: Ignore Invalid SSL Certificate Date (expired certificate)
Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Failure; URL=" & sURL

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Failure; URL=" & sURL

Step.label: REST: Activate Guard
Step.notes:
https://guardmodule-api.n-allo.dvp
c_sURLGuardAPI & "/api/Guards/Activate/" & GetAt(lsValuesList1, Find(lsNamesList1, "id", 0))

Parameter.label: Ignore Invalid SSL Certificate Date (expired certificate)

Step.label: StrEqlNoCase(sResponseBody, "true")
Step.notes: iIndexArray <= iCountArray

Step.label: Not Allowed
Step.notes: "You are currently the only active member. Therefor, you're not able to deactivate yourself."

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "You are currently the only active member. Therefor, you're not able to deactivate yourself."

Step.label: Deactivated
Step.notes: "Your number: " & sCallingPartyNumber & ", is succesfully deactivated for: " & sConfigName"

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "Your number: " & sCallingPartyNumber & ", is succesfully deactivated for: " & sConfigName

Step.label: Technical Issue
Step.notes: "We encountered a technical issue while deactivating you. Contact your administrator to report this issue."

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "We encountered a technical issue while deactivating you. Contact your administrator to report this issue."

Step.label: Activated
Step.notes: "Your number: " & sCallingPartyNumber & ", is currently Activated for: " & sConfigName

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "Your number: " & sCallingPartyNumber & ", is currently Activated for: " & sConfigName

Step.label: Technical Issue
Step.notes: "We encountered a technical issue while deactivating you. Contact your administrator to report this issue."

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "We encountered a technical issue while deactivating you. Contact your administrator to report this issue."

Step.label: Technical Issue
Step.notes: "We encountered a technical issue while deactivating you. Contact your administrator to report this issue."

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "We encountered a technical issue while deactivating you. Contact your administrator to report this issue."

Step.label: Active = Yes?
Step.notes:
not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "No") or not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "0")
StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "0")

Parameter.name: Condition
Parameter.value: not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "No") or not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "0")

Step.label: Cannot Find Parameter
Step.notes: "Get Structured Parameter - Cannot Find Parameter; GuardTUI API URL"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Get Structured Parameter - Cannot Find Parameter; GuardTUI API URL"

Step.label: Error
Step.notes: "Get Structured Parameter - Error; GuardTUI API URL"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Get Structured Parameter - Error; GuardTUI API URL"

Step.label: Technical Issue
Step.notes: "We encountered a technical issue while deactivating you. Contact your administrator to report this issue."

Parameter.label: Text
Parameter.value: "We encountered a technical issue while deactivating you. Contact your administrator to report this issue."
